is an association of 14 regional [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") leagues which together comprise the third-tier of [football in Namibia](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia"). It operates under the auspices of the [Namibia Football Association](/wiki/Namibia_Football_Association "Namibia Football Association").[[1]](#cite_note-Namibian_football-1)
["NFA Renumerates Regional Second Divisions"](https://www.pressreader.com/namibia/new-era/20200619/282029034482041). New Era. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
Konjure, Romanus. ["Regional soccer deplorable"](https://www.thevillager.com.na/articles/1118/regional-soccer-deplorable/). The Villager. Retrieved 19 July 2021.

["Six Namibia Football Association members hold succesful [*sic*] elections ahead of Congress"](https://www.soka25east.com/six-namibia-football-association-members-hold-succesful-elections-ahead-of-congress/). Soka 25 East. Retrieved 19 July 2021.

["Rush Ups crowned Kharas Second Division Coastal Stream winners"](https://namibiadailynews.info/rush-ups-crowned-kharas-second-division-coastal-stream-winners/). Namibia Daily News. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
["Namibia: Football Promotional Playoffs Kick Off"](https://southafricanewsgazette.com/namibia-football-promotional-playoffs-kick-off/). South African News Gazette. Retrieved 19 July 2021.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football league

Regional Second Division

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Country | [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") |
| [Confederation](/wiki/Geography_of_association_football "Geography of association football") | [CAF](/wiki/Confederation_of_African_Football "Confederation of African Football") |
| Level on pyramid | 3 |
| [Promotion](/wiki/Promotion_and_relegation "Promotion and relegation") to | [First Division](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)") |

The **Regional Second Division** is an association of 14 regional [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") leagues which together comprise the third-tier of [football in Namibia](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia"). It operates under the auspices of the [Namibia Football Association](/wiki/Namibia_Football_Association "Namibia Football Association").[[1]](#cite_note-Namibian_football-1)

## Organization

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_Regional_Second_Division&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Organization")]

Each of the 14 [regions of Namibia](/wiki/Regions_of_Namibia "Regions of Namibia") operates its own Regional Second Division league.[[2]](#cite_note-Renumerates-2)[[3]](#cite_note-deplorable-3) In 2019 a [FIFA](/wiki/FIFA "FIFA") Normalisation Committee worked with the regional associations to meet requirements to be in compliance as members of the NFA.[[4]](#cite_note-Successful_Elections-4)

## Promotion

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_Regional_Second_Division&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Promotion")]

The winners of each regional league enters a play-off competition to determine promotion to the [First Division](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)").[[5]](#cite_note-Rush_Ups_crowned-5)[[6]](#cite_note-Promotional_Playoffs_Kick_Off-6)

## References

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_Regional_Second_Division&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: References")]

1. **[^](#cite_ref-Namibian_football_1-0)** ["Namibian football"](http://www.league321.com/namibia-football.html). League 321. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
2. **[^](#cite_ref-Renumerates_2-0)** ["NFA Renumerates Regional Second Divisions"](https://www.pressreader.com/namibia/new-era/20200619/282029034482041). New Era. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
3. **[^](#cite_ref-deplorable_3-0)** Konjure, Romanus. ["Regional soccer deplorable"](https://www.thevillager.com.na/articles/1118/regional-soccer-deplorable/). The Villager. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
4. **[^](#cite_ref-Successful_Elections_4-0)** ["Six Namibia Football Association members hold succesful [*sic*] elections ahead of Congress"](https://www.soka25east.com/six-namibia-football-association-members-hold-succesful-elections-ahead-of-congress/). Soka 25 East. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
5. **[^](#cite_ref-Rush_Ups_crowned_5-0)** ["Rush Ups crowned Kharas Second Division Coastal Stream winners"](https://namibiadailynews.info/rush-ups-crowned-kharas-second-division-coastal-stream-winners/). Namibia Daily News. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
6. **[^](#cite_ref-Promotional_Playoffs_Kick_Off_6-0)** ["Namibia: Football Promotional Playoffs Kick Off"](https://southafricanewsgazette.com/namibia-football-promotional-playoffs-kick-off/). South African News Gazette. Retrieved 19 July 2021.
